title: Exploring Arts & Music: A Vocabulary Pack for ELLs
description: This vocabulary pack introduces key terms related to arts and music for English Language Learners in grades 3-5. It includes 12 vocabulary items, a mini-book, and three engaging worksheets to support language acquisition.

vocabulary.image_prompt: A person painting on a canvas with a brush, smiling.
A person playing a guitar and singing into a microphone.
A hand holding a paintbrush, adding blue color to a picture of a sky.
A child drawing a house and a tree on paper with crayons.
A person with an open mouth, musical notes floating around their head.
Two children moving their bodies to music, one spinning, one jumping.
A collection of musical instruments: a drum, a flute, and a small keyboard.
A clay sculpture of an animal, like a bird or a cat, on a pedestal.
A curved line of musical notes flowing smoothly across a staff.
A series of drums and percussion instruments with repeating beat lines.
An empty performance stage with red curtains and spotlights shining down.
A group of diverse people sitting in rows, clapping and watching a performance.

worksheets.instructions_en: Match the English word to its Spanish translation. Draw a line from the English word to the correct Spanish word.
worksheets.instructions_l2: Empareja la palabra en inglés con su traducción en español. Dibuja una línea desde la palabra en inglés hasta la palabra en español correcta.

worksheets.instructions_en: Trace the vocabulary word and then write it on the line below. Say the word aloud.
worksheets.instructions_l2: Traza la palabra del vocabulario y luego escríbela en la línea de abajo. Di la palabra en voz alta.

worksheets.instructions_en: Color the pictures and say the vocabulary word for each one.
worksheets.instructions_l2: Colorea los dibujos y di la palabra del vocabulario para cada uno.

items.image_prompt: Outline drawing of an artist painting a picture.
Outline drawing of a musician playing a violin.
Outline drawing of paint tubes and brushes.
Outline drawing of a hand holding a pencil, drawing a star.
Outline drawing of a child singing into a microphone.
Outline drawing of two kids dancing with happy expressions.
Outline drawing of a small clay pot or figure.
Outline drawing of musical notes on a staff.
Outline drawing of a drum set.
Outline drawing of a simple stage with a curtain.
Outline drawing of several people sitting and watching.

mini_book.title: My World of Arts and Music

pages.text_en: My World of Arts and Music
pages.text_l2: Mi Mundo de Artes y Música

pages.text_en: Art and music are wonderful ways to express ourselves. We can create beautiful things and enjoy amazing sounds.
pages.text_l2: El arte y la música son formas maravillosas de expresarnos. Podemos crear cosas hermosas y disfrutar de sonidos increíbles.
pages.image_prompt: art and music are wonderful ways to express ourselves

pages.text_en: An artist likes to paint and draw. They use colors and lines to make pictures come alive.
pages.text_l2: A un artista le gusta pintar y dibujar. Usan colores y líneas para hacer que las imágenes cobren vida.
pages.image_prompt: artist likes to paint and draw

pages.text_en: A musician loves to make music. They often play an instrument, like a guitar or a piano.
pages.text_l2: A un músico le encanta hacer música. A menudo tocan un instrumento, como una guitarra o un piano.

pages.text_en: We can sing songs with our voices. We can also dance to the music, moving our bodies to the beat.
pages.text_l2: Podemos cantar canciones con nuestras voces. También podemos bailar al ritmo de la música, moviendo nuestros cuerpos al compás.
pages.image_prompt: we can sing songs with our voices

pages.text_en: Sometimes artists make a sculpture. A sculpture is a 3D artwork, like a statue made of clay or wood.
pages.text_l2: A veces los artistas hacen una escultura. Una escultura es una obra de arte en 3D, como una estatua hecha de arcilla o madera.

pages.text_en: Music has a melody, which is the main tune. It also has a rhythm, which is the pattern of sounds.
pages.text_l2: La música tiene una melodía, que es la melodía principal. También tiene un ritmo, que es el patrón de sonidos.
pages.image_prompt: music has a melody, which is the main tune

pages.text_en: Performers go on a stage to show their talents. The audience watches and claps for their amazing show!
pages.text_l2: Los artistas suben a un escenario para mostrar sus talentos. ¡La audiencia observa y aplaude su increíble espectáculo!
pages.image_prompt: performers go on a stage to show their talents

teacher_notes.objective: Students will be able to identify and use 12 vocabulary words related to 'Arts & Music' in English and Spanish, demonstrating comprehension through various activities.
teacher_notes.suggested_use: Introduce vocabulary daily using flashcards and realia. Read the mini-book together to build context and fluency. Use worksheets for independent practice, small group work, or homework. Encourage students to share their own experiences with arts and music.
materials_needed: Flashcards of vocabulary words (English and Spanish)
Real objects or pictures representing instruments, art supplies, etc.
differentiation_tips: **For beginning ELLs:** Provide sentence starters for discussions. Pair with a more proficient student for activities. Focus on identifying words with images rather than writing.
**For developing ELLs:** Encourage them to use vocabulary words in simple sentences. Ask open-ended questions. Have them create their own simple drawings or musical sounds related to the words.

**For advanced ELLs:** Challenge them to write short paragraphs using multiple vocabulary words. Research different types of instruments or art forms. Lead group discussions about their favorite art or music.
